zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Byrd於1436年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，她的父親John Bird21歲，母親Isabella Curzon16歲。她於1454年之前與Sir James Barbor在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年1月30日在英國英格蘭素福爾可素福爾可享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Byrd于1436年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，她的父亲John Bird21岁，母亲Isabella Curzon16岁。她于1454年之前与Sir James Barbor在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年1月30日在英国英格兰素福爾可素福爾可享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Byrd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bird  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Byrd was born in 1436, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bird, was 21 and her mother, Isabella Curzon, was 16. She married Sir James Barbor before 1454, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 30 January 1479, in Suffolk, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Byrd est née en 1436, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bird, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella Curzon, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Barbor avant 1454, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1479, à Suffolk, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Sie hat vor 1454 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Sir James Barbor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Lei sposato Sir James Barbor prima del 1454, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan Byrdが1436年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Birdは21歳，母Isabella Curzonは16歳であった。1454年以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドでSir James Barborと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年1月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスフォルクで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Byrd(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bird(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Curzon(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1454년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 Sir James Barbor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수폴크에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Byrd родилась в 1436 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bird было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Curzon, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Barbor перед 1454 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1479 г. в местности суффолк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.
